verses.text: “Mi khat in bawngtal ahi a, tuu ahi zongin gu a, a that a, a zuak zongin, amah in bawngtal khat tangdingin bawngtal nga, tuu khat tangdingin tuu li pia ding hi. Amah in ditkikna bawl ding hi. Amah in bangmah a neih kei leh, ama guktakna hangin amah kizuak ding hi. A kigu ganhing, bawngtal ahi a, la ahi a, tuu ahi zongin a hingin ama khutsungah a kimuh leh, amah in a zah nih pia ding hi. “Guta khat in inn vutlet a, kisatin amah a sih leh, tua sihna hangin mawhna omlo ding hi. Ahih hangin nisuah khit ahih leh tua sihna hangin mawhna om ding hi
“Mi khat in lo khatah ahi a, leenggui lo-ah ahi zongin gan ta sak a, a ganhing khahin midang khat' lo-ah a tat leh, amah in ama lo leh ama leenggah lo panin a piangte tawh loh ding hi
“Mei kuangin gam kang a, a kikhol an ahi a, a ding lai an ahi a, lo ahi zongin a kat leh, mei a kangsakpa in a cing takin loh ding hi
“Mi khat in a vengte kiangah sum ahi a, van ahi zongin kep ding ap a, tua mipa' inn panin a kiguk leh, a gupa a kimuh leh amah in a zah nih pia ding hi
A gupa a kimuh kei leh a vengpa' vante amah in gu hiam, gulo hiam cih a kitelna dingin thukhente kiangah inn neipa in kiciamna bawl ding hi

“Thu neihna khat peuhpeuh, bawngtal ahi a, la ahi a, tuu ahi a, puansilh ahi zongin, a mang na khat peuhpeuh, mi khat in, ‘Hih pen kei-a' hi,’ a cihna thu-ah, alang nihte' thu pen thukhente' mai-ah tung ding hi. Thukhente in a mawhsak mipa in a vengpa tungah a zah nih pia ding hi
“Mi khat in ama vengte tungah la ahi a, bawngtal ahi a, tuu ahi zongin, ganhing khat peuhpeuh kep dingin a piak a, kuama muh lohin tua ganhing a si a, a liam a, a kihawlkhia ahi zongin ahih leh
amah in a vengpa' neihsa a gu kha hiam cih a kitheihna dingin amaute gel' kikalah Topa tawh kiciamna om ding hi. A neipa in tua kiciamna sang ding a, amah in lohlo ding hi
Ahih hangin ama tung panin a kigu ahih leh, a neipa tungah amah in loh ding hi
Gamsa in a balzan ahih leh, lahtelna dingin tua ganhing paipih sak in. A kibalzan ganhing amah in lohlo ding hi
“Mi khat in a vengte' gan khat peuhpeuh kawm a, a neipa omloin a liam a, a si zongin, amah in a kicingin loh ding hi
A neipa tawh a omkhawm ahih leh amah in lohlo ding hi. A kikawm ahih leh a kikawm bangin pai ding hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Gamtatna leh Biakna tawh Kisai Thute

verses.text: “Mi khat in a kidong nailo nungak khat zolin amah tawh a lupkhop leh, amah in tuanu' man ding moman letsong pia ding a, ama zi suak ding hi
A numei' pa in ama tungah tuanu a piak nop kei leh zong, tua mipa in nungak moman letsong zah numei' pa' tungah sum pia veve ding hi
“Numei aisannu na hingkhawi kei ding uh hi
“Ganhing tawh a mawh peuhmah kithat ding hi
“ Topa bek simloh pasian dang khat peuhpeuh tungah biakna a pia mi peuhmah kithat ding hi
“Khualmi khatpeuh na bawlsia kei ding uh a, na nengniam kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note zong Egypt leitangah khual mite na hi ngei uh hi
Meigong numei ahi a, tagah ahi zongin na gimsak kei ding uh hi
Note in amaute na gimsak uh a, amaute keima tungah hong kiko leh, keimah in amau' kikona ka za taktak ding hi
Ka hehna so-in namsau tawh note kong that ding a, na zite uh meigong suakin, na tate uh tagah suak ding hi
“Note tawh a om, a zawng keima mite khat peuhpeuh tungah sum leitawi na piak uh leh, ama tungah sum leitawi a piapa bangin na om kei ding uh a, ama tung panin a meet na dok kei ding uh hi
Khapna ahi na vengpa' puan silh lai na lak ngei khak leh nitum ma-in ama tungah na pia kik ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh ama silh ding tua bek hi a, tua pen ama pumpi-a' dingin a puan neihsun ahi hi. Amah bang dang tawh lum ding ahi hiam? Amah kei tungah hong kiko leh ke'n ka za ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah in hehpihna ka nei hi
“Thukhente na simmawh kei ding uh a, na mite uh a ukpa zong na samsia kei ding uh hi
“Na anlakna pan uh leh sathau leh leenggah na suknate uh panin a leetkhiate piak khiat ding na zekai kei ding uh hi. “Na tapa cilte uh keima tungah nong pia ding uh hi
Na bawngtalte uh leh na tuute uh panin zong tua bangmahin nong pia ding uh hi. Ni sagih sung a pi tawh om ding a, a ni giat ni-in kei tungah nong pia ding uh hi
“Note pen kei' tungah hong ki-ap mite na hi ding uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin gamlakah gamsate in a balzan sa peuhmah note in na ne kei ding uh a, tua bang sate uite na lot ding uh hi.
